title: What is the purpose implications of this scene from EoE
display_title: What is the purpose implications of this scene from EoE
wikitext:
[]: What is the purpose/implications of this scene from EoE             Quote Post by Jobhug » Thu Feb 08, 2007 8:06 pm Just after Yui's wings retract into her like a dying spider and her eyes stop glowing, we see a single Rei floating away with the petrified helmet of Shogōki, then a close up of her face looking at it. What's Rei up to?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 08, 2007 9:44 pm It is Rei III (I believe) and in terms of what she's doing, I *think* she's saying goodbye. Not certian though.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Feb 14, 2007 8:34 pm I take this as being Lilith giving a sort of nod of approval to Yui for her final mission. At first I tought this was Lilith "kicking" Yui out of Unit-01's core and hijacking the Eva for herself. Others on this board have since set me right.

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Wed Feb 14, 2007 8:46 pm BLACKANGEL32076 wrote: I take this as being Lilith giving a sort of nod of approval to Yui for her final mission.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 15, 2007 11:59 pm Jobhug wrote: By final mission do you mean Yui becoming lonely proof that mankind ever existed?

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Fri Feb 16, 2007 2:23 am Reichu wrote: In absolute terms, she is not alone, as she has this big weird-looking red lifeform for company.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Feb 16, 2007 6:48 am Jobhug wrote: Reichu wrote: In absolute terms, she is not alone, as she has this big weird-looking red lifeform for company.

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Fri Feb 16, 2007 7:49 am Szmitten wrote: But there is no sense of day/night (ie time) in space.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Feb 18, 2007 12:42 pm Szmitten wrote: But there is no sense of day/night (ie time) in space.

What's Rei up to?

At first I tought this was Lilith "kicking" Yui out of Unit-01's core and hijacking the Eva for herself. Others on this board have since set me right.
